quotes.text: For God so loved the world that he gave his one and only Son, that whoever believes in him shall not perish but have eternal life.
Trust in the Lord with all your heart and lean not on your own understanding.
I can do all things through Christ who strengthens me.
The Lord is my shepherd, I shall not want.
Be strong and courageous. Do not be afraid; do not be discouraged, for the Lord your God will be with you wherever you go.
Therefore do not worry about tomorrow, for tomorrow will worry about itself. Each day has enough trouble of its own.
But the fruit of the Spirit is love, joy, peace, forbearance, kindness, goodness, faithfulness, gentleness and self-control.
Let us not become weary in doing good, for at the proper time we will reap a harvest if we do not give up.
Come to me, all you who are weary and burdened, and I will give you rest.
Do not be anxious about anything, but in every situation, by prayer and petition, with thanksgiving, present your requests to God.
Love the Lord your God with all your heart and with all your soul and with all your mind.
Jesus answered, 'I am the way and the truth and the life. No one comes to the Father except through me.'
For we know that in all things God works for the good of those who love him, who have been called according to his purpose.
And God is able to bless you abundantly, so that in all things at all times, having all that you need, you will abound in every good work.
In the beginning God created the heavens and the earth.
The fear of the Lord is the beginning of wisdom, and knowledge of the Holy One is understanding.
Commit to the Lord whatever you do, and your plans will succeed.
A man's heart plans his way, but the Lord establishes his steps.
The heavens declare the glory of God; the skies proclaim the work of his hands.
Praise the Lord, my soul; all my inmost being, praise his holy name.
The Lord is my light and my salvation—whom shall I fear?
As the deer pants for streams of water, so my soul pants for you, my God.
You are worthy, our Lord and God, to receive glory and honor and power, for you created all things.
Let the peace of Christ rule in your hearts, since as members of one body you were called to peace. And be thankful.
I have told you all this, so that you may have peace in me. Here on earth you will have many trials and sorrows. But take heart, because I have overcome the world.
The Lord is near to all who call on him, to all who call on him in truth.
My grace is sufficient for you, for my power is made perfect in weakness.
Therefore, as God's chosen people, holy and dearly loved, clothe yourselves with compassion, kindness, humility, gentleness and patience.
I am not ashamed of the gospel, because it is the power of God that brings salvation to everyone who believes.
For now we see only a reflection as in a mirror; then we shall see face to face. Now I know in part; then I shall know fully, even as I am fully known.
You, Lord, keep my lamp burning; my God turns my darkness into light.
Delight yourself in the Lord, and he will give you the desires of your heart.
For to us a child is born, to us a son is given, and the government will be on his shoulders. And he will be called Wonderful Counselor, Mighty God, Everlasting Father, Prince of Peace.
The fear of the Lord adds length to life, but the years of the wicked are cut short.
Better a little with righteousness than much gain with injustice.
Even though I walk through the darkest valley, I will fear no evil, for you are with me; your rod and your staff, they comfort me.
I lie down and sleep; I wake again, because the Lord sustains me.
Wait for the Lord; be strong and take heart and wait for the Lord.
My soul finds rest in God alone; my salvation comes from him.
Great is the Lord and most worthy of praise; his greatness no one can fathom.
Ask and it will be given to you; seek and you will find; knock and the door will be opened to you.
Therefore each of you must put off falsehood and speak truthfully to your neighbor, for we are all members of one body.
Be kind and compassionate to one another, forgiving each other, just as in Christ God forgave you.
The Lord is my helper; I will not be afraid. What can mere mortals do to me?
Let us hold unswervingly to the hope we profess, for he who promised is faithful.
You belong to your father, the devil, and you want to carry out your father's desires. He was a murderer from the beginning, not holding to the truth, for there is no truth in him.
Therefore, put on the full armor of God, so that when the day of evil comes, you may be able to stand your ground, and after you have done everything, to stand.
Do not merely listen to the word, and so deceive yourselves. Do what it says.
If any of you lacks wisdom, you should ask God, who gives generously to all without finding fault, and it will be given to you.
Blessed is the one who trusts in the Lord, whose confidence is in him.
The Lord will guide you always; he will satisfy your needs and will strengthen your frame.
But they who wait for the Lord shall renew their strength; they shall mount up with wings like eagles; they shall run and not be weary; they shall walk and not faint.
It is more blessed to give than to receive.
For the Lord is good and his love endures forever; his faithfulness continues through all generations.
Sing to the Lord a new song, for he has done marvelous things; his right hand and his holy arm have worked salvation for him.
The righteous cry out, and the Lord hears them; he delivers them from all their troubles.
Guard your heart above all else, for it determines the course of your life.
Pleasant words are a honeycomb, sweet to the soul and healing to the bones.
So God created mankind in his own image, in the image of God he created them; male and female he created them.
God saw all that he had made, and it was very good.
I will bless you; I will make your name great, and you will be a blessing.
Is anything too hard for the Lord?
You intended to harm me, but God intended it for good to accomplish what is now being done, the saving of many lives.
The Lord will fight for you; you need only to be still.
I am the Lord your God, who brought you out of Egypt, out of the land of slavery.
Be holy because I, the Lord your God, am holy.
The Lord bless you and keep you; the Lord make his face shine on you.
Love the Lord your God with all your heart and with all your soul and with all your strength.
The Lord himself goes before you and will be with you; he will never leave you nor forsake you.
Man does not live on bread alone but on every word that comes from the mouth of the Lord.
He is the Rock, his works are perfect, and all his ways are just.
Choose for yourselves this day whom you will serve… But as for me and my household, we will serve the Lord.
Where you go I will go, and where you stay I will stay. Your people will be my people and your God my God.
The Lord does not look at the things people look at. People look at the outward appearance, but the Lord looks at the heart.
David said to the Philistine, 'You come against me with sword and spear and javelin, but I come against you in the name of the Lord Almighty.'
The Lord is my rock, my fortress and my deliverer; my God is my rock, in whom I take refuge.
Give your servant a discerning heart to govern your people and to distinguish between right and wrong.
The Lord our God be with us as he was with our ancestors; may he never leave us nor forsake us.

If I shut up the heavens so that there is no rain, or if I command the locust to devour the land, or if I send pestilence among My people, and My people who are called by My name humble themselves and pray.
If my people, who are called by my name, will humble themselves and pray and seek my face and turn from their wicked ways, then I will hear from heaven.
The gracious hand of his God was on him.
Go and enjoy choice food and sweet drinks, and send some to those who have nothing prepared. The joy of the Lord is your strength.
And who knows but that you have come to your royal position for such a time as this?
Naked I came from my mother's womb, and naked I will depart. The Lord gave and the Lord has taken away; may the name of the Lord be praised.
I know that my redeemer lives, and that in the end he will stand on the earth.
Where were you when I laid the earth's foundation? Tell me, if you understand.
The fear of the Lord — that is wisdom, and to shun evil is understanding.
He performs wonders that cannot be fathomed, miracles that cannot be counted.
Blessed is the one who does not walk in step with the wicked.
You make known to me the path of life; you will fill me with joy in your presence.
The earth is the Lord's, and everything in it, the world, and all who live in it.
Taste and see that the Lord is good; blessed is the one who takes refuge in him.
The Lord is close to the brokenhearted and saves those who are crushed in spirit.
The Lord makes firm the steps of the one who delights in him.
God is our refuge and strength, an ever-present help in trouble.
Be still, and know that I am God.
Create in me a pure heart, O God, and renew a steadfast spirit within me.
Cast your cares on the Lord and he will sustain you.
When I am afraid, I put my trust in you.
He who dwells in the shelter of the Most High will rest in the shadow of the Almighty.
For he will command his angels concerning you to guard you in all your ways.
Give thanks to the Lord, for he is good; his love endures forever.
This is the day that the Lord has made; let us rejoice and be glad in it.
The Lord is on my side; I will not fear. What can man do to me?
Your word is a lamp for my feet, a light on my path.
I have hidden your word in my heart that I might not sin against you.
I lift up my eyes to the mountains — where does my help come from? My help comes from the Lord.
The Lord will keep you from all harm — he will watch over your life.
I was glad when they said to me, 'Let us go to the house of the Lord!'
Unless the Lord builds the house, the builders labor in vain.
Children are a heritage from the Lord, offspring a reward from him.
I praise you because I am fearfully and wonderfully made.
Search me, God, and know my heart; test me and know my anxious thoughts.
He heals the brokenhearted and binds up their wounds.
Let everything that has breath praise the Lord.
The Lord is righteous in all his ways and faithful in all he does.
The Lord is gracious and compassionate, slow to anger and rich in love.
He determines the number of the stars and calls them each by name.
Blessed are those whose ways are blameless, who walk according to the law of the Lord.
Great peace have those who love your law, and nothing can make them stumble.
Blessed is the one who trusts in the Lord, whose confidence is in him.
Shout for joy to the Lord, all the earth. Worship the Lord with gladness.
Enter his gates with thanksgiving and his courts with praise.
Know that the Lord is God. It is he who made us, and we are his.
How good and pleasant it is when God's people live together in unity!
The Lord has done great things for us, and we are filled with joy.
Weeping may stay for the night, but rejoicing comes in the morning.
You are my hiding place; you will protect me from trouble.
I love the Lord, for he heard my voice; he heard my cry for mercy.
I will extol the Lord at all times; his praise will always be on my lips.
Do not fret because of those who are evil or be envious of those who do wrong.
The Lord upholds all who fall and lifts up all who are bowed down.
I will sing of the Lord's great love forever.
Satisfy us in the morning with your unfailing love, that we may sing for joy.
It is good to praise the Lord and make music to your name, O Most High.
The Lord reigns, he is robed in majesty.
For the Lord is the great God, the great King above all gods.
Come, let us bow down in worship, let us kneel before the Lord our Maker.
Sing to the Lord a new song; sing to the Lord, all the earth.
The Lord reigns, let the earth be glad.
I will bow down toward your holy temple and will praise your name.
Though I walk in the midst of trouble, you preserve my life.
How precious to me are your thoughts, God! How vast is the sum of them!
Teach me to do your will, for you are my God.
Great is our Lord and mighty in power; his understanding has no limit.
Praise the Lord from the heavens; praise him in the heights above.
Sing to him, sing praise to him; tell of all his wonderful acts.
O Lord, you have searched me and you know me.
The Lord is my strength and my shield; my heart trusts in him.
Bless the Lord, O my soul, and forget not all his benefits.
As far as the east is from the west, so far has he removed our transgressions from us.
The Lord is compassionate and gracious, slow to anger, abounding in love.
Give thanks to the Lord, for he is good. His love endures forever.
The Lord redeems his servants; no one who takes refuge in him will be condemned.
Lord, you have been our dwelling place throughout all generations.
The Lord will vindicate his people and have compassion on his servants.
Praise the Lord. Praise God in his sanctuary; praise him in his mighty heavens.
Praise the Lord. How good it is to sing praises to our God.
In all your ways submit to him, and he will make your paths straight.
Honor the Lord with your wealth, with the firstfruits of all your crops.
Do not withhold good from those to whom it is due, when it is in your power to act.
The name of the Lord is a fortified tower; the righteous run to it and are safe.
Start children off on the way they should go, and even when they are old they will not turn from it.
A cheerful heart is good medicine, but a crushed spirit dries up the bones.
Iron sharpens iron, and one person sharpens another.
She is clothed with strength and dignity; she can laugh at the days to come.
Charm is deceptive, and beauty is fleeting; but a woman who fears the Lord is to be praised.
The generous person will prosper; whoever refreshes others will be refreshed.
Whoever finds a wife finds what is good and receives favor from the Lord.
Plans fail for lack of counsel, but with many advisers they succeed.
Speak up for those who cannot speak for themselves, for the rights of all who are destitute.
There is a way that appears to be right, but in the end it leads to death.
Whoever walks in integrity walks securely, but whoever takes crooked paths will be found out.
The fruit of the righteous is a tree of life, and the one who is wise saves lives.
Pride goes before destruction, a haughty spirit before a fall.
The heart of the discerning acquires knowledge, for the ears of the wise seek it out.
A friend loves at all times, and a brother is born for a time of adversity.
Do not gloat when your enemy falls; when they stumble, do not let your heart rejoice.
If your enemy is hungry, give him food to eat; if he is thirsty, give him water to drink.
Where there is no vision, the people perish.
The righteous care about justice for the poor, but the wicked have no such concern.
Better a dry crust with peace and quiet than a house full of feasting, with strife.
He who ignores discipline comes to poverty and shame, but whoever heeds correction is honored.
Walk with the wise and become wise, for a companion of fools suffers harm.
There is a time for everything, and a season for every activity under the heavens.
Two are better than one, because they have a good return for their labor.
Fear God and keep his commandments, for this is the duty of all mankind.
My beloved is mine and I am his.
Place me like a seal over your heart, like a seal on your arm; for love is as strong as death.
Fear not, for I have redeemed you; I have summoned you by name; you are mine.
He was pierced for our transgressions, he was crushed for our iniquities.
Come now, let us settle the matter. Though your sins are like scarlet, they shall be as white as snow.
Do not fear, for I am with you; do not be dismayed, for I am your God.
I am the Lord, and there is no other; apart from me there is no God.
So is my word that goes out from my mouth: it will not return to me empty.
For my thoughts are not your thoughts, neither are your ways my ways.
You will keep in perfect peace those whose minds are steadfast, because they trust in you.
I, the Lord, have called you in righteousness; I will take hold of your hand.
Even to your old age and gray hairs I am he, I am he who will sustain you.
The Spirit of the Sovereign Lord is on me, because the Lord has anointed me to proclaim good news to the poor.
Arise, shine, for your light has come, and the glory of the Lord rises upon you.
In repentance and rest is your salvation, in quietness and trust is your strength.
He gives strength to the weary and increases the power of the weak.
Comfort, comfort my people, says your God.
I, even I, am he who blots out your transgressions, for my own sake, and remembers your sins no more.
You whom I have taken from the ends of the earth, and called from its farthest corners, saying to you, 'You are my servant.'
He was oppressed and afflicted, yet he did not open his mouth; he was led like a lamb to the slaughter.
The wolf will live with the lamb, the leopard will lie down with the goat.
A shoot will come up from the stump of Jesse; from his roots a Branch will bear fruit.
Here I am! Send me!
Holy, holy, holy is the Lord Almighty; the whole earth is full of his glory.
For I know the plans I have for you, declares the Lord, plans to prosper you and not to harm you, plans to give you hope and a future.
Call to me and I will answer you and tell you great and unsearchable things you do not know.
Before I formed you in the womb I knew you.
I will put my law in their minds and write it on their hearts. I will be their God, and they will be my people.
The steadfast love of the Lord never ceases; his mercies never come to an end.
They are new every morning; great is your faithfulness.
The Lord is good to those whose hope is in him, to the one who seeks him.
I will give you a new heart and put a new spirit in you.
I will put my Spirit in you and move you to follow my decrees.
Son of man, can these bones live?
My God sent his angel, and he shut the mouths of the lions.
Those who are wise will shine like the brightness of the heavens.
Return to the Lord your God, for he is gracious and compassionate.
And afterward, I will pour out my Spirit on all people.
He has shown you, O mortal, what is good. And what does the Lord require of you? To act justly and to love mercy and to walk humbly with your God.
The Lord your God is with you, the Mighty Warrior who saves.
Not by might nor by power, but by my Spirit, says the Lord Almighty.
Bring the whole tithe into the storehouse, that there may be food in my house.
For I the Lord do not change.
Though the fig tree does not bud and there are no grapes on the vines… yet I will rejoice in the Lord.
The righteous person will live by his faithfulness.
Return to me, and I will return to you, says the Lord Almighty.
Seek good, not evil, that you may live. Then the Lord God Almighty will be with you.
But let justice roll on like a river, righteousness like a never-failing stream!
Come, let us go up to the mountain of the Lord, to the temple of the God of Jacob.
I sought the Lord, and he answered me; he delivered me from all my fears.
Return, Israel, to the Lord your God. Your sins have been your downfall!
From inside the fish Jonah prayed to the Lord his God.
Those who cling to worthless idols turn away from God's love for them.
The Lord is slow to anger but great in power.
The Lord is good, a refuge in times of trouble. He cares for those who trust in him.
The sun will be turned to darkness and the moon to blood before the coming of the great and glorious day of the Lord.
Blessed are the poor in spirit, for theirs is the kingdom of heaven.
Blessed are those who mourn, for they will be comforted.
Blessed are the meek, for they will inherit the earth.
Blessed are those who hunger and thirst for righteousness, for they will be filled.
Blessed are the merciful, for they will be shown mercy.
Blessed are the pure in heart, for they will see God.
Blessed are the peacemakers, for they will be called children of God.
You are the light of the world. A town built on a hill cannot be hidden.
Let your light shine before others, that they may see your good deeds and glorify your Father in heaven.
Love your enemies and pray for those who persecute you.
But seek first his kingdom and his righteousness, and all these things will be given to you as well.
For where two or three gather in my name, there am I with them.
With man this is impossible, but with God all things are possible.
The Son of Man did not come to be served, but to serve, and to give his life as a ransom for many.
Therefore go and make disciples of all nations.
And surely I am with you always, to the very end of the age.
No one can serve two masters.
Do not store up for yourselves treasures on earth, but store up for yourselves treasures in heaven.
You are the salt of the earth.
Enter through the narrow gate.
So in everything, do to others what you would have them do to you.
My yoke is easy and my burden is light.
Those who are well have no need of a physician, but those who are sick.
The time has come. The kingdom of God has come near. Repent and believe the good news!
Everything is possible for one who believes.
Love the Lord your God with all your heart and with all your soul and with all your mind and with all your strength.
Love your neighbor as yourself.
Go into all the world and preach the gospel to all creation.
Come, follow me, and I will send you out to fish for people.
Whoever wants to be my disciple must deny themselves and take up their cross and follow me.
For even the Son of Man did not come to be served, but to serve.
For nothing will be impossible with God.
For the Son of Man came to seek and to save the lost.
Give, and it will be given to you.
Do not be afraid, little flock, for your Father has been pleased to give you the kingdom.
In the same way, I tell you, there is rejoicing in the presence of the angels of God over one sinner who repents.
For everyone who exalts himself will be humbled, and everyone who humbles himself will be exalted.
If you love those who love you, what credit is that to you?
But I tell you who hear me: Love your enemies, do good to those who hate you.
Father, forgive them, for they do not know what they are doing.
Today salvation has come to this house.
Blessed are you who are poor, for yours is the kingdom of God.
God is spirit, and his worshipers must worship in the Spirit and in truth.
I am the bread of life. Whoever comes to me will never go hungry.
I am the light of the world. Whoever follows me will never walk in darkness.
You will know the truth, and the truth will set you free.
I am the resurrection and the life. The one who believes in me will live, even though they die.
A new command I give you: Love one another. As I have loved you, so you must love one another.
Do not let your hearts be troubled. You believe in God; believe also in me.
Peace I leave with you; my peace I give you.
I am the vine; you are the branches. If you remain in me and I in you, you will bear much fruit.
Greater love has no one than this: to lay down one's life for one's friends.
You did not choose me, but I chose you.
Sanctify them by the truth; your word is truth.
Blessed are those who have not seen and yet have believed.
For God did not send his Son into the world to condemn the world, but to save the world through him.
I am the good shepherd. The good shepherd lays down his life for the sheep.
My sheep listen to my voice; I know them, and they follow me.
I give them eternal life, and they shall never perish; no one will snatch them out of my hand.
Lazarus, come out!
I am the door. If anyone enters by me, he will be saved.
Repent and be baptized, every one of you, in the name of Jesus Christ for the forgiveness of your sins.
Salvation is found in no one else, for there is no other name under heaven given to mankind by which we must be saved.
We must obey God rather than human beings.
In him we live and move and have our being.
For we cannot help speaking about what we have seen and heard.
The Lord opened her heart to respond to Paul's message.
Believe in the Lord Jesus, and you will be saved — you and your household.
For all have sinned and fall short of the glory of God.
For the wages of sin is death, but the gift of God is eternal life in Christ Jesus our Lord.
Therefore, there is now no condemnation for those who are in Christ Jesus.
For I am convinced that neither death nor life… will be able to separate us from the love of God.
If God is for us, who can be against us?
Therefore, I urge you, brothers and sisters, in view of God's mercy, to offer your bodies as a living sacrifice.
Do not conform to the pattern of this world, but be transformed by the renewing of your mind.
Love must be sincere. Hate what is evil; cling to what is good.
Do not be overcome by evil, but overcome evil with good.
For everyone who calls on the name of the Lord will be saved.
Faith comes from hearing the message, and the message is heard through the word about Christ.
The God of hope fill you with all joy and peace as you trust in him.
For the kingdom of God is not a matter of eating and drinking, but of righteousness, peace and joy in the Holy Spirit.
For I am not ashamed, for I know whom I have believed.
For the message of the cross is foolishness to those who are perishing, but to us who are being saved it is the power of God.
God is faithful; he will not let you be tempted beyond what you can bear.
Love is patient, love is kind. It does not envy, it does not boast.
And now these three remain: faith, hope and love. But the greatest of these is love.
Where, O death, is your victory? Where, O death, is your sting?
Therefore, my dear brothers and sisters, stand firm. Let nothing move you.
Do you not know that your bodies are temples of the Holy Spirit?
For I resolved to know nothing while I was with you except Jesus Christ and him crucified.
No eye has seen, no ear has heard, and no human mind has conceived the things God has prepared for those who love him.
Be on your guard; stand firm in the faith; be courageous; be strong.
For we live by faith, not by sight.
Therefore, if anyone is in Christ, the new creation has come: the old has gone, the new is here!
God made him who had no sin to be sin for us, so that in him we might become the righteousness of God.
May the grace of the Lord Jesus Christ, and the love of God, and the fellowship of the Holy Spirit be with you all.
Praise be to the God and Father of our Lord Jesus Christ, the Father of compassion and the God of all comfort.
Therefore we do not lose heart. Though outwardly we are wasting away, yet inwardly we are being renewed day by day.
For our light and momentary troubles are achieving for us an eternal glory that far outweighs them all.
I have been crucified with Christ and I no longer live, but Christ lives in me.
For it is by grace you have been saved, through faith — and this is not from yourselves, it is the gift of God.
For we are God's handiwork, created in Christ Jesus to do good works.
Be strong in the Lord and in his mighty power.
Speak to one another with psalms, hymns, and songs from the Spirit.
Do not let any unwholesome talk come out of your mouths, but only what is helpful for building others up.
And the peace of God, which transcends all understanding, will guard your hearts and your minds in Christ Jesus.
Finally, brothers and sisters, whatever is true, whatever is noble, whatever is right… think about such things.
I have learned to be content whatever the circumstances.
My God will meet all your needs according to the riches of his glory in Christ Jesus.
Being confident of this, that he who began a good work in you will carry it on to completion.
For to me, to live is Christ and to die is gain.
In humility value others above yourselves.
Whatever you do, work at it with all your heart, as working for the Lord.
Put on love, which binds everything together in perfect harmony.
Let your conversation be always full of grace, seasoned with salt.
Set your minds on things above, not on earthly things.
Rejoice always, pray continually, give thanks in all circumstances.
May God himself, the God of peace, sanctify you through and through.
For God has not given us a spirit of fear, but of power and of love and of a sound mind.
All Scripture is God-breathed and is useful for teaching, rebuking, correcting and training in righteousness.
I have fought the good fight, I have finished the race, I have kept the faith.
Preach the word; be prepared in season and out of season.
The grace of God has appeared that offers salvation to all people.
He saved us, not because of righteous things we had done, but because of his mercy.
Now faith is confidence in what we hope for and assurance about what we do not see.
Therefore, since we are surrounded by such a great cloud of witnesses, let us run with perseverance the race marked out for us.
Jesus Christ is the same yesterday and today and forever.
For the word of God is alive and active, sharper than any double-edged sword.
Let us then approach God's throne of grace with confidence.
And without faith it is impossible to please God.
No discipline seems pleasant at the time, but painful. Later on, however, it produces a harvest of righteousness.
By faith Abraham, when called to go to a place he would later receive as his inheritance, obeyed and went.
For here we do not have an enduring city, but we are looking for the city that is to come.
Do not forget to show hospitality to strangers, for by so doing some people have shown hospitality to angels without knowing it.
Submit yourselves, then, to God. Resist the devil, and he will flee from you.
Humble yourselves before the Lord, and he will lift you up.
The prayer of a righteous person is powerful and effective.
Every good and perfect gift is from above, coming down from the Father of the heavenly lights.
Draw near to God and he will draw near to you.
Consider it pure joy, my brothers and sisters, whenever you face trials of many kinds.
Blessed is the one who perseveres under trial because, having stood the test, that person will receive the crown of life.
Praise be to the God and Father of our Lord Jesus Christ! In his great mercy he has given us new birth into a living hope.
Cast all your anxiety on him because he cares for you.
Humble yourselves, therefore, under God's mighty hand, that he may lift you up in due time.
His divine power has given us everything we need for a godly life.
The Lord is not slow in keeping his promise… he is patient with you, not wanting anyone to perish.
But you are a chosen people, a royal priesthood, a holy nation.
For you were like sheep going astray, but now you have returned to the Shepherd and Overseer of your souls.
Above all, love each other deeply, because love covers over a multitude of sins.
Be alert and of sober mind. Your enemy the devil prowls around like a roaring lion.
God is love. Whoever lives in love lives in God, and God in them.
We love because he first loved us.
If we confess our sins, he is faithful and just and will forgive us our sins.
This is love: not that we loved God, but that he loved us and sent his Son as an atoning sacrifice for our sins.
Everyone born of God overcomes the world. This is the victory that has overcome the world, even our faith.
See what great love the Father has lavished on us, that we should be called children of God!
Dear children, let us not love with words or speech but with actions and in truth.
There is no fear in love. But perfect love drives out fear.
The darkness is passing and the true light is already shining.
I am writing to you, dear children, because your sins have been forgiven on account of his name.
Dear friend, I pray that you may enjoy good health and that all may go well with you.
To him who is able to keep you from stumbling and to present you before his glorious presence without fault — to the only God our Savior be glory, majesty, power and authority.
I am the Alpha and the Omega, the First and the Last, the Beginning and the End.
Behold, I stand at the door and knock. If anyone hears my voice and opens the door, I will come in.
He will wipe every tear from their eyes. There will be no more death or mourning or crying or pain.
Worthy is the Lamb, who was slain, to receive power and wealth and wisdom and strength.
I am making everything new!
I am the Living One; I was dead, and now look, I am alive for ever and ever!
To him who overcomes, I will give the right to eat from the tree of life.
Hallelujah! For our Lord God Almighty reigns.
I saw the Holy City, the new Jerusalem, coming down out of heaven from God.
Blessed are those who wash their robes, that they may have the right to the tree of life.
Now have come the salvation and the power and the kingdom of our God.
Blessed are the dead who die in the Lord from now on.
These are they who have come out of the great tribulation; they have washed their robes.
Write, therefore, what you have seen, what is now and what will take place later.
Come, Lord Jesus.
O Lord, our Lord, how majestic is your name in all the earth!
When I consider your heavens, the work of your fingers, what is mankind that you are mindful of them?
The Lord is my portion; I have promised to obey your words.
How long, Lord? Will you forget me forever?
But I trust in your unfailing love; my heart rejoices in your salvation.
Keep me safe, my God, for in you I take refuge.
My heart is glad and my tongue rejoices; my body also will rest secure.
I keep my eyes always on the Lord. With him at my right hand, I will not be shaken.
As for me, I will be vindicated and will see your face; when I awake, I will be satisfied with seeing your likeness.
The law of the Lord is perfect, refreshing the soul.
May the words of my mouth and this meditation of my heart be pleasing in your sight, Lord, my Rock and my Redeemer.
My God, my God, why have you forsaken me?
For he has not despised or scorned the suffering of the afflicted one.
The Lord is my shepherd, I lack nothing. He makes me lie down in green pastures.
Surely your goodness and love will follow me all the days of my life.
Who may ascend the mountain of the Lord? Who may stand in his holy place?
The Lord sits enthroned over the flood; the Lord is enthroned as King forever.
Sing to the Lord, you his faithful people; praise his holy name.
Blessed is he whose transgressions are forgiven, whose sins are covered.
The Lord's unfailing love surrounds the one who trusts in him.
Blessed is the nation whose God is the Lord, the people he chose for his inheritance.
The eyes of the Lord are on those who fear him, on those whose hope is in his unfailing love.
The righteous person may have many troubles, but the Lord delivers him from them all.
Do not be far from me, for trouble is near and there is no one to help.
I will praise you, Lord, with all my heart; I will tell of all your wonderful deeds.
The Lord reigns forever; he has established his throne for judgment.
But the Lord sits enthroned forever, and his rule endures to all generations.
In the beginning you laid the foundations of the earth, and the heavens are the work of your hands.
For as high as the heavens are above the earth, so great is his love for those who fear him.
From everlasting to everlasting the Lord's love is with those who fear him.
He remembers that we are dust.
Praise the Lord, all his heavenly hosts, you his servants who do his will.
Bless the Lord, O my soul! O Lord my God, you are very great.
May the glory of the Lord endure forever; may the Lord rejoice in his works.
He remembered us in our low estate, for his love endures forever.
By the rivers of Babylon we sat and wept when we remembered Zion.
The Lord will fulfill his purpose for me; your steadfast love, O Lord, endures forever.
Where can I go from your Spirit? Where can I flee from your presence?
For you created my inmost being; you knit me together in my mother's womb.
Your eyes saw my unformed body; all the days ordained for me were written in your book before one of them came to be.
I know that the Lord secures justice for the poor and upholds the cause of the needy.
Set a guard over my mouth, Lord; keep watch over the door of my lips.
I cry aloud to the Lord; I lift up my voice to the Lord for mercy.
For your name's sake, Lord, preserve my life; in your righteousness, bring me out of trouble.
Praise be to the Lord my Rock, who trains my hands for war, my fingers for battle.
The Lord is good to all; he has compassion on all he has made.
The Lord watches over all who love him, but all the wicked he will destroy.
He gives food to every creature. His love endures forever.
I will sing praise to my God as long as I live.
Blessed are those whose help is the God of Jacob, whose hope is in the Lord their God.
The Lord reigns forever, your God, O Zion, for all generations.
Praise the Lord. Sing to the Lord a new song, his praise in the assembly of his faithful people.
For the Lord takes delight in his people; he crowns the humble with victory.
My flesh and my heart may fail, but God is the strength of my heart and my portion forever.
Whom have I in heaven but you? And earth has nothing I desire besides you.
But as for me, it is good to be near God.
How lovely is your dwelling place, Lord Almighty!
Better is one day in your courts than a thousand elsewhere.
No good thing does he withhold from those whose walk is blameless.
Restore us, God Almighty; make your face shine on us, that we may be saved.
Righteousness and peace kiss each other.
You are forgiving and good, O Lord, abounding in love to all who call to you.
Among the gods there is none like you, Lord; no deeds can compare with yours.
Teach me your way, Lord, that I may rely on your faithfulness.
I will praise you, Lord my God, with all my heart; I will glorify your name forever.
He who goes out weeping, carrying seed to sow, will return with songs of joy.
You open your hand and satisfy the desires of every living thing.
The Lord is my portion; therefore I will wait for him.
Wisdom is more precious than rubies, and nothing you desire can compare with her.
I was appointed from eternity, from the beginning, before the world began.
Blessed are those who listen to me, watching daily at my doors, waiting at my doorway.
For through wisdom your days will be many, and years will be added to your life.
The Lord does not let the righteous go hungry.
When a man's ways please the Lord, he makes even his enemies live at peace with him.
The crucible for silver and the furnace for gold, but the Lord tests the heart.
Discipline your children, for in that there is hope; do not be a willing party to their death.
Gold there is, and rubies in abundance, but lips that speak knowledge are a rare jewel.
Listen to your father, who gave you life, and do not despise your mother when she is old.
Do not move an ancient boundary stone set up by your ancestors.
As water reflects the face, so one's life reflects the heart.
The wicked flee though no one pursues, but the righteous are as bold as a lion.
Whoever conceals their sins does not prosper, but the one who confesses and renounces them finds mercy.
See, I am doing a new thing! Now it springs up; do you not perceive it?
I have swept away your offenses like a cloud, your sins like the morning mist.
Turn to me and be saved, all you ends of the earth; for I am God, and there is no other.
I have loved you with an everlasting love; I have drawn you with unfailing kindness.
There is hope for your descendants, declares the Lord.
If anyone is thirsty, let him come to me and drink.
Very truly I tell you, whoever hears my word and believes him who sent me has eternal life.
Jesus wept.
Now is the time for judgment on this world; now the prince of this world will be driven out.
When he, the Spirit of truth, comes, he will guide you into all the truth.
My prayer is not for them alone. I pray also for those who will believe in me through their message.
Do you love me? Feed my sheep.
Those who accepted his message were baptized, and about three thousand were added to their number that day.
The Lord added to their number daily those who were being saved.
Silver or gold I do not have, but what I do have I give you.
There is neither Jew nor Gentile, neither slave nor free, nor is there male and female, for you are all one in Christ Jesus.
You were running a good race. Who cut in on you to keep you from obeying the truth?
Carry each other's burdens, and in this way you will fulfill the law of Christ.
May I never boast except in the cross of our Lord Jesus Christ.
For in him all things were created: things in heaven and on earth.
He is before all things, and in him all things hold together.
For God was pleased to have all his fullness dwell in him.
As you therefore have received Christ Jesus the Lord, so walk in him.
Endure hardship as a good soldier of Christ Jesus.
If we died with him, we will also live with him.
Do your best to present yourself to God as one approved, a worker who does not need to be ashamed.
Now the Lord is the Spirit, and where the Spirit of the Lord is, there is freedom.
The eyes of your heart may be enlightened in order that you may know the hope to which he has called you.
Now to him who is able to do immeasurably more than all we ask or imagine.
Make every effort to keep the unity of the Spirit through the bond of peace.
There is one body and one Spirit, just as you were called to one hope when you were called.
Husbands, love your wives, just as Christ loved the church.
Put on the full armor of God, so that you can take your stand against the devil's schemes.
In addition to all this, take up the shield of faith, with which you can extinguish all the flaming arrows of the evil one.
Join together in following my example, brothers and sisters.
But our citizenship is in heaven.
Christ, who is your life, appears.
Whatever you do, in word or deed, do it all in the name of the Lord Jesus.
Devote yourselves to prayer, being watchful and thankful.
Make the most of every opportunity.
May the Lord direct your hearts into God's love and Christ's perseverance.
Godliness with contentment is great gain.
For the love of money is a root of all kinds of evil.
Fight the good fight of the faith.
Command those who are rich in this present world not to be arrogant nor to put their hope in wealth.
The Lord will rescue me from every evil attack and will bring me safely to his heavenly kingdom.
Since we have a great high priest who has ascended into heaven, Jesus the Son of God, let us hold firmly to the faith we profess.
By faith Noah, when warned about things not yet seen, in holy fear built an ark.
And do not forget to do good and to share with others, for with such sacrifices God is pleased.
Keep your lives free from the love of money and be content with what you have.
May the God of peace, who through the blood of the eternal covenant brought back from the dead our Lord Jesus.
In the past God spoke to our ancestors through the prophets at many times and in various ways.
The Son is the radiance of God's glory and the exact representation of his being.
For the Lord knows the way of the righteous, but the way of the wicked will perish.
Not to us, Lord, not to us but to your name be the glory, because of your love and faithfulness.
Oh, how I love your law! I meditate on it all day long.
Direct my footsteps according to your word; let no sin rule over me.
The unfolding of your words gives light; it gives understanding to the simple.
Salvation belongs to the Lord; may your blessing be on your people!
Answer me when I call to you, my righteous God. Give me relief from my distress.
For you are not a God who is pleased with wickedness; with you, evil people are not welcome.
The Lord has set apart his faithful servant for himself; the Lord hears when I call to him.
Give thanks to the Lord, for he is good; his love endures forever.
Open to me the gates of the righteous; I will enter and give thanks to the Lord.
I will not die but live, and will proclaim what the Lord has done.
The stone the builders rejected has become the cornerstone.
The Lord God formed a man from the dust of the ground and breathed into his nostrils the breath of life.
I will put enmity between you and the woman, and between your offspring and hers; he will crush your head.
Then the Lord said to Cain, 'Why are you angry? Why is your face downcast?'
I establish my covenant with you: Never again will all life be destroyed by the waters of a flood.
By faith Abraham, when God tested him, offered Isaac as a sacrifice.
He took him outside and said, 'Look up at the sky and count the stars — if indeed you can count them… So shall your offspring be.'
I am El-Shaddai — God Almighty. Walk before me faithfully and be blameless.
God himself will provide the lamb for the burnt offering, my son.
I will bless those who bless you, and whoever curses you I will curse.
Remember the Sabbath day by keeping it holy.
Honor your father and your mother, so that you may live long in the land the Lord your God is giving you.
You shall not murder.
You shall not steal.
You shall have no other gods before me.
I will be with you. And this will be the sign to you that it is I who have sent you.
I AM WHO I AM. This is what you are to say to the Israelites: I AM has sent me to you.
The Lord passed before him and proclaimed, 'The Lord, the Lord, a God merciful and gracious, slow to anger, and abounding in steadfast love.'
You shall love your neighbor as yourself: I am the Lord.
For the life of a creature is in the blood.
He satisfies the thirsty and fills the hungry with good things.
Some trust in chariots and some in horses, but we trust in the name of the Lord our God.
O Lord, you are my God; I will exalt you; I will praise your name.
In that day they will say, 'Surely this is our God; we trusted in him, and he saved us.'
The ransomed of the Lord will return. They will enter Zion with singing; everlasting joy will crown their heads.
The desert and the parched land will be glad; the wilderness will rejoice and blossom.
I, the Lord, am your Savior and your Redeemer, the Mighty One of Jacob.
Can a mother forget the baby at her breast? Though she may forget, I will not forget you!
I have engraved you on the palms of my hands.
How beautiful on the mountains are the feet of those who bring good news.
Seek the Lord while he may be found; call on him while he is near.
The Lord is with me like a mighty warrior; so my persecutors will stumble and not prevail.
The Lord your God is a consuming fire, a jealous God.
